generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T AURUM FULMINANS. Formula , Au 2 O 3 4NH 3 OH 2 . The substance referred to by Hahnemann is doubtful. (See Chr. Kr., 1, 242). ► Pains in the bowels (Pharmac. Wurt., II), (not obtainable). ► Sinking of strength, faintness, cold sweat on the limbs, violent vomiting, convulsions (Hoffmann, Med. Rat. Syst., etc.), (statement of pernicious effects of A., Leading on to death). ► Forcible evacuations from the bowels (Ludovici Pharm., etc.), (not obtainable). Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
